title: Welcome to CodeQuest
body: Choose your goal and academy to get a focused first pathway.

title: You are activated
body: You passed your first exercise. Your next step is to complete the module.

title: Continue where you left off
body: Your current lesson is ready to resume.

title: 7 days left in your Starter Pack
body: Continue your projects and export any evidence you want to keep.

title: 3 days left in your Starter Pack
body: Your work will remain visible after expiry.

title: Credential earned
body: Your new credential is available in your Skills Passport.
